series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence and information relating to various topics which do not directly affect office or board functions, policies or procedures.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one (1) year maximum after the end of the calendar year in which created/received, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain one (1) year maximum after the end of the calendar year in which created/received, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
